scripts.dev: concurrently --names frontend,backend --prefix "[{name}]" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" --kill-others "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "dotnet run --project backend/src/AiInterview.Api/AiInterview.Api.csproj"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently --names frontend,backend,ai-service --prefix "[{name}]" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta" --kill-others "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "dotnet run --project backend/src/AiInterview.Api/AiInterview.Api.csproj" "cd ai-service && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload --reload-dir app"
scripts.dev:ai-service: cd ai-service && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload --reload-dir app
